medium_findings.code_snippet: const panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('tokenlensDashboard', 'TokenLens Dashboard', vscode.ViewColumn.Beside, { enableScripts: true, retainContextWhenHidden: true });

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
